zh.lifeSummary: 當Warin de Burwardeslegh於大約1142年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾時，他的父親William FitzWarin25歲，母親Unknown-3歲。他於大約1173年與Melete Perverell在英國英格蘭史洛普爾艾斯利結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。他去世於1205年在他的家鄉享年64歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Warin de Burwardeslegh于大约1142年出生在英国英格兰斯塔福爾时，他的父亲William FitzWarin25岁，母亲Unknown-3岁。他于大约1173年与Melete Perverell在英国英格兰史洛普爾艾斯利结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。他去世于1205年在他的家乡享年64岁。

nameMeanings.name: Warin
meanings: An old name. The same as Waring or Guerin, who came over with the Conqueror; a name probably connected with that of the Waernas or Wernas. the Varini or Verini, a people of the Elbe

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Short form of the various boys' names with the first syllable Ed-, especially Edward .

variants.name: Edward
meanings: From an Old English personal name derived from ēad ‘prosperity, riches’ + weard ‘guard’. This has been one of the most successful of all Old English names, in frequent use from before the Conquest to the present day, and even being exported into other European languages. It was the name of three Anglo-Saxon kings and has been borne by eight kings of England since the Norman Conquest. It is also the name of the youngest son of Queen Elizabeth II . The most influential early bearer was King Edward the Confessor ( ?1002–66 ; ruled 1042–66 ). In a troubled period of English history, he contrived to rule fairly and (for a time at any rate) firmly. But in the latter part of his reign he paid more attention to his religion than to his kingdom. He died childless, and his death sparked off conflicting claims to his throne, which were resolved by the victory of William the Conqueror at the Battle of Hastings. His memory was honoured by Normans and English alike, for his fairness and his piety. Edward's mother was Norman; he had spent part of his youth in Normandy; and William claimed to have been nominated by Edward as his successor. Edward was canonized in the 12th century, and came to be venerated throughout Europe as a model of a Christian king.

en.lifeSummary: When Warin de Burwardeslegh was born about 1142, in Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, William FitzWarin, was 25 and his mother, Unknown, was -3. He married Melete Perverell about 1173, in Astley, Shropshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. He died in 1205, in his hometown, at the age of 64.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Warin de Burwardeslegh est né environ 1142, à Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, William FitzWarin, avait 25 ans et sa mère, Unknown, avait -3 ans. Il a épousé Melete Perverell environ 1173, à Astley, Shropshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Il est décédé en 1205, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 64 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Warin de Burwardesleghが約1142年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアで生まれた時，父William FitzWarinは25歳，母Unknownは-3歳であった。約1173年にイギリスイギリスシュロプシュアイアアストリーでMelete Perverellと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼は1205年に故郷で64歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Warin de Burwardeslegh(이)가 대략 1142년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William FitzWarin(은)는 25세였고, 그의 어머니 Unknown(은)는 -3세였다. 그는 대략 1173년 영국 잉글랜드 슈럽실르 애스틀리에서 Melete Perverell(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1205년 그의 고향에서 64세의 나이로 사망했다.
